intro.quietSpace: Find a quiet space and allow yourself enough time to read carefully.

preTest.title: Pre-Test Assessment
preTest.dontWorry: Don't worry about the score — this is just your starting point.

chiefComplaint.title: Chief Complaint & Clinical History
chiefComplaint.subtitle: Read the case carefully, then explore the history-taking questions below.
chiefComplaint.readyToProceed: Ready to proceed to the physical examination?

physicalExam.subtitle: Work through each component of the HINTS exam systematically.

workup.subtitle: Expand each investigation to interpret the data.
workup.colorCodeHint: Apply the color code above to the image and form your interpretation.

management.subtitle: Select the best treatment option for each stage.

interactive.title: Interactive Q&A
interactive.completeSubtitle: You've answered all interactive questions. Proceed to the post-test.
interactive.feedbackNote:
Feedback has been recorded.
The post-test will assess your knowledge growth after this case.

postTest.title: Post-Test Assessment
postTest.congratulations: Congratulations on completing all assessments for this case!

analytics.title: Learning Report
analytics.subtitle: Here is your overall performance after completing this case

insights.excellent: Your knowledge improved by {delta}%! The case study had a significant effect — keep up this learning momentum.
insights.good: Post-test improved by {delta}%, showing concrete gains from the case. Deeper review can push the score higher.
insights.steady: Performance was steady (+{delta}%). You had strong baseline knowledge — consider a more advanced case next.
insights.reflect: The case gave you new perspectives and clinical frameworks. Mastering clinical reasoning takes time — review the key learning points.
